get.description: Get audit logs based on filters.

schema.title: Response Get Audits Api V1 Audit  Get

delete.description: Schedule cleanup of old audit logs for the current tenant.

get.description:
Kubernetes Liveness Probe.
Returns 200 OK if the app loop is running.

Kubernetes Readiness Probe.
Checks Database connectivity.
Returns 503 if critical dependencies are down.

post.description:
Enqueues a python script execution task.
Expects the script to be Base64 encoded to prevent JSON/Transport issues.

Executes a predefined suite of Base64 scripts for system verification.
Uses asyncio.gather to enqueue tasks in parallel for performance.

schema.title: Response Get Status Api V1 Tasks  Task Id  Get

post.description: Re-fetches OpenAPI specs from all configured microservices and re-registers MCP tools.
Create a new persistent sandbox session.

schema.title: Response List Sandboxes Api V2 Sandbox Get

get.description: Get metadata for a specific sandbox session.

delete.description: Stop and remove a sandbox session.

post.description: Execute an arbitrary shell command inside a sandbox.
Upload files into a sandbox container.

post.description: Download files from a sandbox container.
